title: OSF Intelligence Profile (v7, Multi-Truth / Golden / SetupMode)
description: Schema for files under profiles/intelligence/*.json — central-computed knowledge entities (Discrepancy, ProductionPart lineage, SetupMode, GoldenProcessParameters + GoldenOutcome + ConditioningEffect, AutoResolveRule). A THIRD class beyond edge telemetry (profiles/machines/) and IT business events (profiles/business/, erp/qms/wms): these nodes are produced by the central intelligence engines (discrepancy-engine, golden-engine, view-engine) and written straight into the KG — they are NOT edge-sourced, so they deliberately carry NO delivery/scope/promotion wire-contract.

profileId.description: Globally unique profile ID, prefix SMProfile-

category.description: Intelligence profiles only — telemetry lives in profiles/machines/, business events in profiles/business|erp|qms|wms/.

abstract.description: Abstract parent profiles (e.g. SMProfile-Discrepancy, SMProfile-ProductionPart) are not instantiated directly; concrete children declare parentType to inherit attributes + relationships. Same flag semantics as machine/business schemas.

attributes.description: Structural properties of the node. Concrete children may declare 0 attributes and rely entirely on inherited ones. No delivery/scope/promotion — intelligence entities are not wired from edges.
